Projects

Coursework and personal projects from SDU and beyond.

Python

  • Sorting Network Generator 1st sem

    Generating optimal sorting networks for lists.

  • C3Paw — Cat & Dog Classifier 4th sem

    CNN-based image classifier using PyTorch.

  • Path & CNN Optimization 4th sem

    Shortest-path algorithms and CNN optimisation.

  • Mood2-D2 — Emotion Classifier 4th sem

    Classifying emotions from facial expressions.

  • Simplex Environment Search & ROAR-NET-API problem solving 4th sem

    Simplex method and roar-net-api solver.

Java

  • Pacman 2nd sem

    Pacman-like game with JavaFX — entities, collision detection, AI ghosts.

Haskell

  • snakey 3rd sem

    A DSL for defining and running 1v1 snake-like games.

Web

  • Typstnique personal

    A game for learning Typst syntax.

  • Practice Quiz App personal

    Quiz app for SDU exam practice — multiple choice + free response with MathJax rendering.

Notes & Coursework

  • SDU Notes sem 2–5

    Typst lecture notes covering algorithms, ML, linear algebra, KR, and more.
